pain_points.signal: Frequent Bluetooth connection drops and pairing instability
Difficulty reconnecting after device sleep or reboot
Missing essential keyboard keys (e.g., Esc, arrow keys)
High latency or input lag, especially on Android-to-Android control
Pro version payment verification issues or perceived greed (features locked)

Full keyboard functionality including all essential keys (arrow, Esc)
Seamless control across multiple devices (PC, Android, tablet) with low latency
Advanced features like saved macros, custom layouts, pinch-to-zoom
Easy remote control for media (volume, playback) from a distance
Accessibility support for users with physical limitations (voice typing, custom keys)
No ads or subscriptions; transparent one-time payment for pro features
Quick-access widget for one-press commands without launching app
